_comment: Live assistant on demo-pro-1: answers all 8 answerable questions correctly with valid citations, and correctly abstains on the 2 questions the sources do not cover.

p1.text: Full-time employees accrue 25 days of annual leave per calendar year, plus public holidays; up to 5 unused days carry over. [doc:hr-1]

p2.text: You may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval; fully remote arrangements additionally require HR sign-off. [doc:hr-2]

p3.text: Submit expense reports through FinancePortal within 30 days of purchase, with receipts attached; approval goes to your cost-center owner. [doc:hr-3]

p4.text: Primary caregivers receive 16 weeks fully paid parental leave, secondary caregivers 4 weeks, available from the first day of employment. [doc:hr-4]

p5.text: Performance reviews run twice a year, in March and September; self-assessments open two weeks before each cycle. [doc:hr-5]

p6.text: Notify your manager before 10:00 on the first day of absence; a doctor's note is required from the fourth consecutive day. [doc:hr-6]

p7.text: Yes — the company matches pension contributions up to 6% of base salary, vested immediately. [doc:hr-7]

p8.text: Core working hours are 10:00 to 15:00 local time; outside those hours you schedule flexibly with your team. [doc:hr-8]

p9.text: The provided policy sources do not cover sabbatical leave, so I don't know. Please contact HR directly for an authoritative answer.

p10.text: The expense source describes the submission procedure but not which items are expensable, so I don't know whether a home office chair qualifies. Please check with your cost-center owner.
